coreMethods: Hybrid Retrieval: Vector + BM25 + RRF + Rerank (BGE-reranker-v2-m3)
Graph Retrieval: Entity matching + neighbor relations + APOC plugin
Multi-Agent Orchestration: LangGraph workflow + conditional routing
Tiered Execution: Fast/Balanced/Deep modes + load degradation
Parent-Child Chunking: Balance precision and context (parent 1500 / child 600 tokens)
Query Rewrite: Dedup optimization reduces 10-30% redundant LLM calls
Chinese NLP: Tokenization + synonym expansion + query preprocessing
Advanced RAG: Query decomposition + Self-RAG evaluation
Streaming Generation: SSE chunk return + heartbeat keepalive
Streaming PDF: True streaming + 70% memory optimization
Batch Chart Extraction: Parallel processing + throughput optimization
Image Captioning: AI-driven visual content description
Prompt Management: Version control + approval workflow + rollback
Performance Comparison: Baseline system + comprehensive evaluation metrics
Agent Visualization: Real-time tracking + SSE streaming updates
CI/CD Quality Gate: Automated RAG evaluation + performance benchmarking
database: SQLite: Users, sessions, audit logs, prompt versions, encrypted API settings
File System: Document uploads (uploads/user_*/) + OCR cache
Memory Cache: Retrieval config + runtime state
security: Password Policy: PBKDF2 hash + salt + 12-128 chars + special char requirements
JWT Auth: Bearer token + HttpOnly Cookie + expiration
Approval Tokens: Single-use + constant-time comparison against timing attacks
Rate Limiting: Admin ops 1-5 req/hour + query quotas
Input Validation: Security checks + dangerous command blocking + SQL injection protection
Session Isolation: User-isolated upload dirs, session files, document access
API Key Encryption: AES encrypted storage + URL whitelist validation
Audit Logging: Full recording of sensitive ops + failure tracking
Circuit Breaker: Fault isolation + bulkhead pattern + retry logic
modelBackends: Ollama: Local deployment (qwen2.5, llama3, deepseek, etc.)
Hybrid Deployment: Local inference + cloud embeddings
Runtime Switching: Dynamic config without restart
operations: Canary Routing: Gradual rollout + A/B testing
Config Rollback: One-click restore to previous version
Query Replay: Historical query re-execution for validation
Load Degradation: Auto-downgrade under high load (>80%)
Prompt Versioning: Track changes + approval flow
Automated Evaluation: RAGAS metrics + regression testing
frontend: Vite 6.4: Fast build + HMR hot reload
Code Splitting: On-demand loading + lazy load optimization
Modern CSS Architecture: Modular + theme system
SSE Streaming Rendering: Real-time message stream display

architecture.apiEndpoints:
# Authentication & Users
POST /auth/register
POST /auth/login
POST /auth/logout
POST /auth/refresh
GET  /auth/me

# Query & Sessions
POST /query
POST /query/stream
GET  /sessions
POST /sessions
DELETE /sessions/{id}
PATCH /sessions/{id}/strategy
PATCH /sessions/{id}/messages/{message_id}
GET  /sessions/{id}/memory
POST /sessions/{id}/memory/clear

# Document Management
GET  /documents
DELETE /documents/{doc_id}
POST /documents/reindex
POST /upload

# Prompt Management
GET  /prompts
POST /prompts
PUT  /prompts/{id}
POST /prompts/check
POST /prompts/{id}/approve
POST /prompts/{id}/rollback

# Admin - User Management
GET  /admin/users
POST /admin/users
PATCH /admin/users/{user_id}/role
PATCH /admin/users/{user_id}/status
DELETE /admin/users/{user_id}

# Admin - Operations
GET  /admin/ops/profiles
POST /admin/ops/profiles
POST /admin/ops/canary
POST /admin/ops/rollback
POST /admin/ops/benchmark
POST /admin/ops/replay
GET  /admin/ops/report

# Admin - Model Config
GET  /admin/model-settings
PUT  /admin/model-settings

# User - API Settings
GET  /user/api-settings
PUT  /user/api-settings

# Evaluation & Tracking
POST /api/evaluation/compare
GET  /api/evaluation/baselines
GET  /api/agent-tracking/executions/{id}
GET  /api/agent-tracking/stream/{id}

# Advanced RAG
POST /api/advanced-rag/decompose
POST /api/advanced-rag/self-rag

# Health Checks
GET  /health
GET  /ready
GET  /metrics
